_style_suffix: minimalist editorial illustration, warm muted color palette, subtle grain, soft natural lighting, centered composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, modern magazine cover style, no text, no typography, no logos
_note: Target filename = slug + .png (or .jpg/.webp). Import-Script matches filename against slug to deposit into public/images/blog/<slug>/hero.webp.

priority_critical.title: Quitter – die einfache Lösung gegen nervige Inaktivitäts-Popups
priority_critical.prompt: A quiet Mac desktop scene with app windows gracefully fading away into soft mist, a calm atmosphere, no annoying popups or notifications, subtle hint of an hourglass or clock symbol in the background, dark gray and warm amber tones.

priority_critical.title: Persönlicher Hotspot auf dem iPhone für das MacBook
priority_critical.prompt: An iPhone and a MacBook floating in space, connected by elegant glowing WiFi signal arcs, clean minimalist flat illustration, blue-to-teal gradient background, a subtle signal-strength pattern.

priority_critical.title: Wie lange erhält mein gebrauchtes Apple-Gerät noch Updates?
priority_critical.prompt: A stylized timeline showing Apple devices (iPhone, iPad, MacBook) along a horizontal line with subtle year markers fading from bright to faded, minimalist infographic style, warm gray and soft orange accents.

priority_critical.title: Spart Euch bei der Telefonnummer diese Null in Klammer
priority_critical.prompt: An abstract typographic illustration of a phone number with international country code, a single zero in parentheses gently crossed out with a red brushstroke, minimalist editorial composition, warm paper-beige background.

priority_critical.title: willhaben Betrug mit Amazon Gutscheinen
priority_critical.prompt: A stylized gift card with subtle warning aura and a lurking shadowy figure behind it, caution atmosphere, muted red and dark brown palette, modern editorial illustration, no text.

priority_critical.title: Wie fühlt es sich an, zu hören: 'Den kenn ich schon'
priority_critical.prompt: Two abstract speech bubbles facing each other, one glowing with enthusiasm and one flat and cold, a small heart fading between them, soft muted rose and lavender palette, minimalist editorial illustration.

priority_recommended.title: FaceTime-Anrufe auf dem Mac transkribieren
priority_recommended.prompt: A Mac laptop showing a FaceTime video call window with subtle speech waves transforming into flowing text transcript beside it, clean flat illustration, soft blue and silver gradient, minimalist.

priority_recommended.title: Payback-Punkte bei Amazon mit Kurzbefehle-App
priority_recommended.prompt: An iPhone home screen with a custom shortcut icon featuring a shopping cart and a loyalty-points star, subtle Amazon-orange accent on a muted background, minimalist flat illustration.

priority_recommended.title: Kostenfalle Videoanruf-Symbole
priority_recommended.prompt: A smartphone icon with a video-call button subtly morphing into a warning exclamation mark, coins falling in the background, muted red and ochre palette, minimalist editorial illustration.

priority_recommended.title: MacOS Anrufe nicht automatisch über Skype
priority_recommended.prompt: A Mac screen showing a clean phone-call settings panel with FaceTime and Skype icons separated by a gentle dividing line, FaceTime highlighted with warm accent, minimalist UI illustration style.

priority_recommended.title: Apple Beats / AirPods Probleme - Erste Hilfe
priority_recommended.prompt: Over-ear Beats headphones and a pair of AirPods arranged on a light wooden surface, soft diffused window light, minimalist product photography style, calm warm tones.

priority_recommended.title: iOS 15 und macOS 12: Erledigte Erinnerungen löschen
priority_recommended.prompt: An iPhone screen showing a clean Reminders list with checkmarks being gently swept away by a subtle broom, minimalist flat illustration, soft pastel palette.

priority_recommended.title: Schließe dauernd die falschen Fenster
priority_recommended.prompt: A cursor hovering confused over multiple nearly-identical Mac browser windows stacked like cards, one almost accidentally being closed, minimalist flat illustration, warm beige and muted blue palette.

priority_recommended.title: Birkenbihl Sprachen Adobe Air Lösung
priority_recommended.prompt: A retro-modern scene of a CD-ROM disk with language symbols floating elegantly from it, soft nostalgic gradient of ochre and teal, minimalist editorial illustration.

priority_recommended.title: So löschen Sie alle erledigten Erinnerungen
priority_recommended.prompt: An iPhone screen displaying a shortcut with a glowing trash icon and a clean list of completed reminders, calm pastel palette, minimalist flat illustration.

priority_recommended.title: Mitteilung auf dem iPhone über Batterie-Lebensdauer
priority_recommended.prompt: An iPhone showing a battery health notification with a subtle heartbeat line behind it, muted green and soft blue palette, minimalist editorial illustration.

priority_recommended.title: Welchen Anteil erhalten Künstler durch Apple Music?
priority_recommended.prompt: A musical note elegantly transforming into coins that gently fall onto a stylized sound wave, minimalist flat illustration, warm red and soft gold accents.

priority_recommended.title: Tanita Waage in Apple Health importieren
priority_recommended.prompt: A modern bathroom scale with an SD card emerging from it, next to an Apple Health heart icon, minimalist flat illustration, soft green and warm gray palette.

priority_optional.title: Diese verfluchten WhatsApp-Häckchen
priority_optional.prompt: Stylized chat bubbles with WhatsApp-style checkmarks – one gray, one blue – with a small anxious thought swirling between them, minimalist editorial illustration, soft green and muted gray palette.

priority_optional.title: Die Magie des 90-Minuten-Schlafzyklus
priority_optional.prompt: A serene bedroom at night with a subtle sine wave flowing above the bed representing sleep cycles, HomePod on the bedside table, warm amber lamp light, minimalist illustration.

priority_optional.title: Fisch enthält kein Omega 3 dafür Weidefleisch
priority_optional.prompt: A stylized composition of a wild river fish and grass-fed beef on a wooden board, natural rustic photography style, soft window light, earthy greens and warm browns.

priority_optional.title: Dieser Blog änderte meine Sicht auf Ernährung
priority_optional.prompt: A farmers market stand with seasonal vegetables and herbs, warm natural sunlight, documentary photography style, earthy saturated tones, minimalist composition.

priority_optional.title: Mantram - Hilfe durch die Kraft des Wortes
priority_optional.prompt: An abstract spiral of soft glowing letters or syllables rising from a calm hand, meditative atmosphere, warm amber and deep blue gradient, minimalist editorial illustration.

priority_optional.title: Hammer und Nagel - Geschichte von Paul Watzlawick
priority_optional.prompt: A hammer and nail arranged on a textured wooden surface with a subtle shadow suggesting a thoughtful conversation, minimalist still life, warm grayscale with a single soft amber accent.
